benefits.name: Complete Property Tax Exemption (100% Disabled)
benefits.description: Veterans with 100% VA disability rating receive full homestead exemption from property taxes. Exemption value varies by county.
benefits.notes: Full homestead exemption for 100% service-connected disabled veterans. Bad conduct discharge may disqualify.

benefits.name: Partial Property Tax Exemption (Disabled Veterans)
benefits.description: Veterans with service-connected disability receive a $89,348 homestead exemption from property taxes.
benefits.notes: $89,348 exemption requires service-connected disability rating. Updated amount as of 2026.

benefits.name: Vehicle Ad Valorem Tax Exemption (100% Disabled)
benefits.description: Veterans with 100% disability rating are exempt from vehicle ad valorem tax on one personally owned vehicle.
benefits.notes: Exemption applies to one vehicle titled and registered in Georgia. Requires 100% disability rating.

benefits.name: Free Veteran Specialty License Plate
benefits.description: Disabled veterans receive free specialty veteran license plates. Also available: POW and Purple Heart plates.
benefits.notes: Distinctive plates for disabled veterans, POW, and Purple Heart recipients. Free issuance and renewal.

benefits.name: Free Hunting and Fishing License
benefits.description: Veterans with 50% or higher service-connected disability rating receive a free lifetime hunting and fishing license.
benefits.notes: Lifetime license for 50%+ disabled veterans. Honorary license available. Issued by Georgia Department of Natural Resources.

benefits.name: Georgia Veterans Education Career Transition (VECT)
benefits.description: State tuition waiver for eligible Georgia veterans at Georgia public colleges and universities.
benefits.notes: Tuition waiver for eligible veterans at University System of Georgia institutions. Based on eligibility criteria and enrollment status.

benefits.name: State Income Tax Retirement Exclusion
benefits.description: Military retirement pay excluded from Georgia state income tax: up to $35,000 (ages 62–64) or up to $65,000 (age 65+).
benefits.notes: Military retirement income exclusion: $35,000 (age 62–64), $65,000 (age 65+). No residency requirement for this benefit.

benefits.name: State Employment Preference
benefits.description: Georgia gives hiring preference to veterans in state civil service positions.
benefits.notes: Veterans receive preference points or priority consideration in Georgia state employment hiring.

benefits.name: Georgia War Veterans Home
benefits.description: Long-term care facility for eligible Georgia veterans. Locations in Milledgeville and Augusta.
benefits.notes: State-operated veteran homes providing long-term care for eligible Georgia resident veterans. Honorable or General discharge required.
